nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 海岸湿地
nodes.summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

nodes.name: Grey-headed fish eagle
nodes.summary: Grey-headed fish eagle（Grey-headed fish eagle，学名 Icthyophaga ichthyaetus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，常见栖息地包括海岸湿地、河口、沼泽。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 河口
nodes.summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |issue=1 |bibcode=2002BCons.107..111T}} The grey-headed fish eagle inhabits lowland forest up to an elevation of . It builds nests close to bodies of water such as slow-moving rivers and streams, lakes, lagoons, reservoirs, marshes, swamps and coastal lagoons and estuaries. It also frequents irrigation tanks in Sri Lanka
